arts.ttl: Chelsea have serious Moises Caicedo problem but £164m solution for Enzo Maresca is clear
arts.sum: If this was to come on Sunday afternoon against Leicester City at Stamford Bridge, then the Ecuador international would be suspended for the following top-flight matches against Arsenal on March 16 and then Tottenham on April 3. Caicedo has been an integral cog in the Enzo Maresca system in the head coach's debut campaign with the west London club and has arguably been the most consistent performer in this time.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 2025/26 Nike home shirt images 'leaked' as shirt sponsor possibilities emerge
arts.sum: The leaked kit doesn't offer any drastic changes on a classic Chelsea look, but Nike seems to have stuck with their bold patterns on top of the classic blue - that has divided fans on many of the club's recent kits. Gone are this year's electric waves that annoyed many fans; instead, Nike appears to have lightened the blue and added a faint geometric design, although it's not yet clear what the shapes are supposed to represent.
